message:
feat(fuzz): add fuzz targets for btrfs DevItem and ext4 htree/MMP parsing

Extend the fuzz harness with two new targets to exercise previously
uncovered on-disk structure parsing paths:

- fuzz_btrfs_devitem: covers btrfs DevItem deserialization edge cases
- fuzz_ext4_htree_mmp: covers ext4 HTree directory index and MMP block parsing

These complement the existing adversarial corpus entries added in 2d53508
and close the fuzz coverage gap for the most recent conformance fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,3 +66,13 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_ext4_checksums"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_ext4_checksums.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_ext4_htree_mmp"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_ext4_htree_mmp.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_btrfs_devitem"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_btrfs_devitem.rs"
+doc = false
